codeReview.summary: The feature satisfies VAL-ACD-009. ensure_sensitive_model_ready now gates first-use registration through a per-model mutex/condvar state machine, resets to pending on failure, and the added runtime/store regressions demonstrate concurrent cold-start callers converge on one established context without breaking later reuse semantics.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-library-worker skill does not mention that stable Rust lacks OnceLock::get_or_try_init, even though this single-flight task naturally pushes workers toward that API before they fall back to a custom gate.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.suggestedChanges for worker session eaab35e3-2180-441a-9202-37674d075e1a explicitly calls this out after implementing AutoCryptoInit in core/src/crypto.rs.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit d8a4117. The single-flight refactor and focused regressions are aligned with VAL-ACD-009, and I found no blocking or non-blocking code issues for this feature.
